samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU. Supports various arithmetic and logical operations including ADD, SUB, AND, OR, XOR, NOR, SLT, SLTU, SLL, SRL, SRA, SLLV, SRLV, SRAV, and LUI. Outputs results along with flags for zero, carry, negative, overflow, and a general flag for SLT/SLTU operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">6-bit control signal for selecting the operation to be performed.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">1-bit output indicating whether the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">1-bit output indicating whether a carry occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">1-bit output indicating whether the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">1-bit output indicating whether an overflow occurred during the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">1-bit output representing a general flag, which is set based on specific operations (SLT and SLTU).</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="ADD" value="6'b100000" description="Addition operation."/>
        <constant name="ADDU" value="6'b100001" description="Unsigned Addition operation."/>
        <constant name="SUB" value="6'b100010" description="Subtraction operation."/>
        <constant name="SUBU" value="6'b100011" description="Unsigned Subtraction operation."/>
        <constant name="AND" value="6'b100100" description="Bitwise AND operation."/>
        <constant name="OR" value="6'b100101" description="Bitwise OR operation."/>
        <constant name="XOR" value="6'b100110" description="Bitwise XOR operation."/>
        <constant name="NOR" value="6'b100111" description="Bitwise NOR operation."/>
        <constant name="SLT" value="6'b101010" description="Set Less Than operation."/>
        <constant name="SLTU" value="6'b101011" description="Unsigned Set Less Than operation."/>
        <constant name="SLL" value="6'b000000" description="Shift Left Logical operation."/>
        <constant name="SRL" value="6'b000010" description="Shift Right Logical operation."/>
        <constant name="SRA" value="6'b000011" description="Shift Right Arithmetic operation."/>
        <constant name="SLLV" value="6'b000100" description="Shift Left Logical Variable operation."/>
        <constant name="SRLV" value="6'b000110" description="Shift Right Logical Variable operation."/>
        <constant name="SRAV" value="6'b000111" description="Shift Right Arithmetic Variable operation."/>
        <constant name="LUI" value="6'b001111" description="Load Upper Immediate operation."/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign r[31:0] = res[31:0];>
            Assigns the lower 32 bits of the result to the output 'r'.
        </assign>
        <assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1 : z;>
            Sets the 'flag' output to '1' if the operation is SLT or SLTU, otherwise sets it to high impedance ('z').
        </assign>
        <assign zero = ~|res[31:0];>
            Sets the 'zero' output to '1' if the result is all zeros, otherwise sets it to '0'.
        </assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        The module implements an ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU. It supports various arithmetic and logical operations, including ADD, SUB, AND, OR, XOR, NOR, SLT, SLTU, SLL, SRL, SRA, SLLV, SRLV, SRAV, and LUI. The module outputs the result of the operation (r), as well as flags for zero, carry, negative, overflow, and a general flag for SLT/SLTU operations. The implementation uses a combination of combinatorial logic and sequential logic to perform the specified operations based on the control signal (aluc).
    </implementation>
</module>
samples.tb_log:

%Warning-WIDTH: alu.v:83:60: Operator COND expects 33 bits on the Conditional True, but Conditional True's REPLICATE generates 32 bits.
                           : ... In instance alu
   83 |                 res_reg = {1'b0, ($signed(a) < $signed(b)) ? {31'b0, 1'b1} : 33'b0};
      |                                                            ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.

                           : ... In instance alu
   83 |                 res_reg = {1'b0, ($signed(a) < $signed(b)) ? {31'b0, 1'b1} : 33'b0};
      |                         ^
%Warning-WIDTH: alu.v:88:42: Operator COND expects 33 bits on the Conditional True, but Conditional True's REPLICATE generates 32 bits.
                           : ... In instance alu
   88 |                 res_reg = {1'b0, (a < b) ? {31'b0, 1'b1} : 33'b0};
      |                                          ^
%Warning-WIDTH: alu.v:88:25: Operator ASSIGN expects 33 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's REPLICATE generates 34 bits.
                           : ... In instance alu

      |                         ^
%Warning-UNUSED: alu.v:32:17: Bits of signal are not used: 'res'[32]
                            : ... In instance alu
   32 |     wire [32:0] res;
      |                 ^~~
